{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Jai clan elder
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan elder]] uses a spear.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan elder]]'s technique produces a white beam of light.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
